case_title: MACPHEE, DONALD et al vs. SHUL, DAVE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACPHEE, DONALD MACPHEE, YVETTE AS TO DEFENDANT TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, IF ANY, NAMED CLAIMANTS, IF ANY, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHUL, DAVE SHUL, GLORIA TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, IF ANY, NAMED CLAIMANTS, IF ANY, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3225 - 20TH STREET, S.F. $3,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, BEGINNING 11/15/93 DEFTS PAY PLTF $1,000.00 PER MONTH AND ON EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL BALANCE PAID IN FULL. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF SHALL RETAIN ANY SECURITY DEPOSITS, LAST MONTH'S RENT, AND ANY INTEREST THEREON. IF DEFT LEAVE PREMISES IN CLEAN CONDITION, PLTF SHALL DEDUCT $500.00. SEE JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

#8 PRO TEM ARNOLD EVJE, REPTR BELDON YEE PLTF ATTY J SACRAMENTO, DEF IN PRO PER 245PM CC FOR SETT CONF. ALL PRESENT. PLTF MOT FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT VS ALL OTHER DEFS AND FOR MERGER INTO THIS STIP IS GRANTED BY COURT. STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMT FOR PLTF VS DEFS FOR POSSESSION OF 3225 20TH ST, SF A ND FOR $3000 RENTS & DAMAGES. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. S/E TIL 9-1-93 AT NOON WRIT OF POSS MAY ISSUE BUT NO PHYS EVIC TIL 9-1-93 AT NOON. S/E ON MONEY JUDGMT TIL 11-15-93 AT WHICH TIME DEFS ARE TO BEGIN PAYING $100 PER MONTH TOWARD $3000 OWED. WHEN ALL PAID PLTF TO FILE SATIS OF JUDGMT. NO FUR S/E. DEF AGREE NO MORE ADULTS IN PREMISES WITH RT TO POSS. THERE IS MUTUAL RELEASE BY EACH SIDE VS THE OTHER.SEC DEP IS RETAINED BY PLTF. IF DEFS OUT BY 9-1-93, PLTF TO DEDUCT $500 FROM $ JUDGMT. LEASE FORFEITED. ALL PRESENT AGREE TO THIS. PLTF ATTY TO PREPARE NECESSARY PAPERS.
